name: VELYX 26.1.2 Building Pack
description: Paper server plugin pack plus optional Fabric client mods for serious Minecraft building.

projects.name: WorldEdit
projects.purpose: Stable WorldEdit editing, brushes, copy/paste, and terrain tools for 26.1.2.
projects.notes: Used instead of FAWE because FAWE 2.15.2 logs mapping errors on Paper 26.1.2.

projects.name: WorldGuard
projects.purpose: Region protection, build rules, PvP flags, and admin-safe construction zones.

projects.name: Axiom Paper Plugin
projects.purpose: Server-side support for the Axiom builder tool.

projects.name: LitematicaFolia
projects.purpose: Server-side .litematic import and direct paste support for builders.

projects.name: Syncmatica Paper
projects.purpose: Shared schematic placement/sync workflow for team builds.

projects.name: BuildersUtilities
projects.purpose: Small builder conveniences bundled into one Paper plugin.

projects.name: BuildersWand
projects.purpose: Fast repeated block placement for walls, floors, and survival-friendly construction.

projects.name: WorldEditDisplay
projects.purpose: Visualizes WorldEdit selections and edit boundaries for safer building.

projects.name: PacketEvents
projects.purpose: Required packet library for WorldEditDisplay and advanced build interaction helpers.

projects.name: WorldEditSelectionVisualizer
projects.purpose: Classic WorldEdit selection visualization support.
projects.notes: Optional because WorldEditDisplay covers the same area on newer servers.

projects.name: SchemImporter
projects.purpose: Extra schematic import utility for server-side build workflows.

projects.name: Take It Out
projects.purpose: Shulker picking and easy-place style quality-of-life for build logistics.

projects.name: BlueMap
projects.purpose: High-quality 3D web map for checking builds from the browser.

projects.name: Chunky
projects.purpose: Pregenerates chunks so build areas load smoothly on the Raspberry Pi.

projects.name: ImageFrame
projects.purpose: Image and GIF maps for signs, posters, logos, and build decoration.

projects.name: EasyArmorStands
projects.purpose: Armor stand and display entity editor for detailed scene dressing.

projects.name: InventoryRollbackPlus
projects.purpose: Player inventory rollback support for safer admin recovery.

projects.name: LuckPerms
projects.purpose: Permission groups for builder/admin access control.

projects.name: Safe Zone Claims
projects.purpose: Simple protected zones for showcase/build areas.

projects.name: Pl3xMap
projects.purpose: Lightweight 2D web map alternative to BlueMap.
projects.notes: Optional because running BlueMap and Pl3xMap together costs extra disk and CPU.

projects.name: Fabric API
projects.purpose: Required API layer for Fabric server mods.

projects.name: WorldEdit
projects.purpose: Fabric WorldEdit commands for large builds, brushes, copy/paste, and terrain edits.

projects.name: BlueMap
projects.purpose: High-quality 3D web map for build inspection.

projects.name: Chunky
projects.purpose: Chunk pregeneration for smooth exploration and build areas.

projects.name: LuckPerms
projects.purpose: Permission groups for builders and admins.

projects.name: Essential Commands
projects.purpose: Fabric replacement for Essentials-style /home, /spawn, /tpa, /warp, /back, and /rtp commands.
projects.notes: 0.39.0-mc26.1.1 does not declare a strict minecraft dependency in fabric.mod.json and works as the current 26.1.x command replacement.

projects.name: Multiworld
projects.purpose: Fabric replacement for Multiverse/world-manager commands: /mw list, /mw tp, /mw create, /mw delete, and flat-world creation.
projects.notes: The 26.1 build is currently published as alpha but declares minecraft >=26.1 and provides the required /mw world commands.

projects.name: Command Aliases
projects.purpose: Restores familiar Paper/Essentials-style short commands by aliasing them to Fabric command implementations.

projects.name: adventure-platform-fabric
projects.purpose: Required text/command platform dependency for Mods Command on Fabric.

projects.name: Mods Command
projects.purpose: Adds server-side /mods and diagnostics commands so Fabric mod lists can be checked in game.

projects.name: ImageFrame Fabric Port
projects.purpose: Fabric replacement for ImageFrame image and GIF maps without requiring client-side mods.
projects.notes: Disabled by default because the current alpha build triggers an ImageIO/TwelveMonkeys startup conflict with BlueMap on the live Fabric server.

projects.name: Armor Stand Editor
projects.purpose: Fabric replacement for EasyArmorStands armor stand editing and scene dressing tools.

projects.name: InvRestore
projects.purpose: Fabric replacement for InventoryRollbackPlus inventory recovery commands.

projects.name: Fabric Language Kotlin
projects.purpose: Required runtime library for Ledger.

projects.name: Ledger
projects.purpose: Fabric replacement for prism/CoreProtect-style block, container, and inventory logging with rollback support.

projects.name: Forge Config API Port
projects.purpose: Required Fabric dependency for Open Parties and Claims.

projects.name: Open Parties and Claims
projects.purpose: Fabric replacement for WorldGuard-style chunk claiming, player parties, force-load controls, and build protection.

projects.name: Flan
projects.purpose: Alternative Fabric land-claim and build-protection mod.
projects.notes: Disabled by default because 26.1.2-1.12.7 logs non-fatal missing-integration ERROR lines for optional mods that are not installed.

projects.name: Construction Wand
projects.purpose: Fabric replacement for BuildersWand repeated block placement.

projects.name: Axiom
projects.purpose: Fabric replacement for the Axiom Paper Plugin server-side builder support.

projects.name: ViaVersion
projects.purpose: Fabric replacement for ViaVersion protocol compatibility.

projects.name: ViaFabric
projects.purpose: Fabric bridge required by ViaVersion, ViaBackwards, and ViaRewind.

projects.name: ViaBackwards
projects.purpose: Fabric replacement for ViaBackwards older-client protocol support.

projects.name: ViaRewind
projects.purpose: Adds extra legacy client compatibility on top of ViaBackwards.

projects.name: Discord-MC-Chat
projects.purpose: Fabric replacement for DiscordPulse/PulseTune-style Minecraft chat bridge support.
projects.notes: Disabled by default because the mod stops startup until a bot token and Discord channel IDs are configured. The live stock notifier/webhook remains handled by the API bridge.

projects.name: spark
projects.purpose: Profiler and diagnostics for server performance.

projects.name: Lithium
projects.purpose: Server-side tick and game logic optimization.

projects.name: FerriteCore
projects.purpose: Memory usage reduction for modded servers.

projects.name: Krypton
projects.purpose: Network stack optimization.

projects.name: ServerCore
projects.purpose: Server performance tuning and view-distance helpers.

projects.name: Servux
projects.purpose: Server support for Litematica/Sakura-Ryoko client workflows.

projects.name: Syncmatica
projects.purpose: Shared schematic placement sync for teams.

projects.name: Carpet
projects.purpose: Technical/building server controls and diagnostics.

projects.name: Fabric API
projects.purpose: Required API layer for most Fabric client mods.

projects.name: Forge Config API Port
projects.purpose: Client dependency for Open Parties and Claims configuration screens.

projects.name: Open Parties and Claims
projects.purpose: Matches the server claim/protection mod and gives players the claim UI.

projects.name: Axiom
projects.purpose: Professional all-in-one creative building and terrain editing client.

projects.name: Construction Wand
projects.purpose: Required by the live server because the server registers constructionwand items.

projects.name: Armor Stand Editor
projects.purpose: Client-side screens and controls for the server armor stand editing mod.

projects.name: WorldEdit CUI
projects.purpose: Client-side WorldEdit selection outlines.

projects.name: MaLiLib
projects.purpose: Required library for Litematica, MiniHUD, and Tweakeroo.

projects.name: Litematica
projects.purpose: Client-side schematic preview, placement, and build planning.

projects.name: MiniHUD
projects.purpose: Light-level, structure, and technical build overlays.

projects.name: Tweakeroo
projects.purpose: Builder quality-of-life toggles and placement helpers.

projects.name: Freecam
projects.purpose: Inspect builds and interiors without moving the player.

projects.name: Syncmatica
projects.purpose: Client-side schematic sharing with the live Syncmatica server mod.

projects.name: Sodium
projects.purpose: Client performance boost for large build areas.
projects.notes: Pinned to the latest 0.8.x release line because Iris 1.10.9 for 26.1.x rejects Sodium 0.9.x beta builds.

projects.name: Iris Shaders
projects.purpose: Shader support for build screenshots and inspection.

projects.name: Continuity
projects.purpose: Connected textures for cleaner build presentation.

excluded.name: CoreProtect
excluded.reason: Latest Modrinth metadata did not advertise 26.1.2 support. The live server already uses prism for block logging and rollback.

excluded.name: FastAsyncWorldEdit
excluded.reason: FAWE 2.15.2 advertises 26.1.2 support but logs Paper 26.1.2 mapping exceptions on the Raspberry Pi server, so stable WorldEdit is used.

excluded.name: StellarProtect
excluded.reason: StellarProtect 1.9.3 disables itself on Paper 26.1.2.build.72 and logs startup errors. Use prism instead.
